title: thlaspi macranthum
intro: Thlaspi macranthum, also known as large-fruited pepperwort or large-fruited crinkle-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of glucosinolates, which are compounds known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thlaspi macranthum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Thlaspi macranthum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
